title: Labeling
doc_html:
§756.  Labeling

All oleomargarine sold in the state shall be labeled in accordance with Part I of this Chapter and with the regulations of the Federal Security Agency governing the labeling of oleomargarine with added vitamin A sold in interstate commerce.
